original_title: RVG-121 Reiko Kobayakawa BEST vol.1 - Kobayakawa Reiko
overview: It's been a few years since I've been spreading the strongest pheromones in the AV industry. The long-awaited best compilation album of "Reiko Kobayakawa", a super beautiful mature woman who continues to bewitch the men of the world, is now available. The genre of the recorded work is exactly like Glory Quest. Includes 9 titles carefully selected from hot springs, shita, old people, black people, NTR ... from royal roads to maniac works. Please enjoy the rich eros of adults for 8 hours. Ms. Kobayakawa's unchanging beauty, lascivious glamorous BODY, and overwhelming sex appeal that can't be put out by a little girl ... It's an unbearable book even if you're not a fan.
